title: Registration Wizard + Website Auto-Indexing — Implementation Plan
summary: TDD-shaped implementation plan with 18 tasks for a 3-step registration wizard that auto-indexes websites via a polite crawler with daily refresh and usage-tracking gating.
notes: Manifest authoritatively types as DOC. Supporting implementation context for shipped feature (PR #25). Contains detailed TDD task instructions with failing tests, migrations, services, controllers, Vue components, and deployment steps.
